task_description: Implement 14 missing features from the Swiggy/Zepto gap analysis (address-first flow, search with add-to-cart, sub-categories, one-tap reorder, order scheduling, delivery tip, live tracking map, multi-language, product ratings, smart suggestions, express checkout, delivery instructions, savings summary, notification preferences), fix all confusing sections from Parts 2/3/4 of the gap analysis, create a TWA GitHub Actions workflow for Android APK, and produce a web-vs-mobile-staff gap analysis report.

verification.summary: prisma generate succeeds, tsc --noEmit has 0 errors, next build succeeds with all routes compiled. npm test shows 61/63 pass - the 2 failures (test 47: error message text, test 54: CSS touch-action) are pre-existing before our changes and unrelated to our work.
